## Verification

- [ ] `pytest` passes (75 tests should remain green)
- [ ] `python3 -m engine.cli.main lint <touched files>` is clean at threshold=high (we dogfood our own linter)
- [ ] No emojis introduced
- [ ] No marketing verbs introduced ("revolutionize", "transform", "unleash", "empower", "streamline")
- [ ] Stats numbers preserved or updated everywhere they appear (998 / 120 / 110 / 22 / 17 / 75)
